title: WIHP Sesebelisoa sa Puo se sa Lekanyetsoeng
subtitle: Ngola lentsoe lefe kapa lefe → Fumana IPA ho tsoa ho Wiktionary → Fetola ho Hangul!
inputPlaceholder: Ngola lentsoe lefe kapa lefe (mohlala: Lumela, Ke a u rata...)
step2a: • Lipuo tse 69: ho batla IPA ho Wiktionary
step2b: • Lipuo tse 28: ho sebelisa Translit API
step2c: • Kaofela lipuo tse 117 tse nang le tšehetso ea IPA ea 100%!
step3: 3. 🏆 IPA → Puo e phethahetseng ea Hangul
canConvert: O ka fetola mantsoe a tsoang lipuong tse 117 tsa lefatše, ho kenyelletsa lipuo tse fetang 20 tsa India!
philosophy: Mantsoe ha aa lokela ho ba le meeli. WIHP e leboha Wiktionary IPA.
